# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net10.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. Includes TFM bump and hosting model modernization (Program.cs + Startup.cs → minimal hosting).

**Progress**: 0/3 tasks complete (0%) ![0%](https://progress-bar.xyz/0)

## Tasks

- 🔲 01-tfm-upgrade: Update TargetFramework to net10.0
- 🔲 02-hosting-model: Modernize Hosting Model
- 🔲 03-build-validate: Build and Validate
